goal: Implement Settings backend + frontend wiring + Audit Log wiring

tasks.description: Create backend models (OrganizationSettings, NotificationSettings, SystemSettings, ApiKey, User.avatar_url)
Create Pydantic schemas for all settings types + API key
Create SettingsService with settings + API key business logic
Create settings API endpoints + profile endpoints (PUT /auth/me, PUT /auth/me/password)
Write tests for settings models, services, and API endpoints
Wire SettingsPage frontend tabs to backend APIs
Wire AuditLogPage frontend to real backend API
Final test run — all existing + new tests pass
